arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe makes honest admission about Real Madrid start
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe reflects honestly on his poor start to life at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah
arts.sum: If Mo Salah leaves Liverpool this summer, the Reds plan to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid as his replacement. Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Red Bull Salzsburg 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Champions League online
arts.sum: Red Bull Salzsburg will be a tougher team than Las Palmas, though, so Ancelotti’s men have to make sure they play with composure and intensity if they want the three points to pave their way to the next round of the Champions League . Real Madrid host Red Bull Salzsburg in what has the potential to be a crucial, season-defining game for Los Blancos, who still have to clinch their presence in the next round of the European competition.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti future: Will legendary Real Madrid boss leave Bernabeu this summer?
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti firmly denies suggestions that he could leave Bernabeu at the end of the campaign and is planning to stay until 2029.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting XI against Salzburg in the Champions League
arts.sum: For Wednesday’s game, Carlo Ancelotti has one key player back: Vinicius Jr. The Brazilian attacker is set to start after missing the weekend win over Las Palmas last Sunday due to suspension. The starting eleven that Ancelotti could field against Salzburg is likely to be: Courtois; Valverde, Asencio, Rüdiger, Fran García; Tchouameni, Ceballos; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinicius; Mbappé.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid defender turns down January transfer exit – listening to offers
arts.sum: Real Madrid are unlikely to do business in the January transfer market, and their backline cannot afford to be weakened by any more losses, be it through injury or transfer. Yet Los Blancos have made it perfectly clear that they do not see losing Jesus Vallejo as weakening their options in the centre-back position. Carlo […] The post Real Madrid defender turns down January transfer exit – listening to offers appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Goodbye to the round of 16? Real Madrid’s uncertain Champions League future
arts.sum: Los Blancos had just defeated Atalanta (3-2), setting their Champions League round-of-16 journey back on track with two games remaining: against Salzburg and the French side Brest, one of the standout teams in this year’s European competition. If they finish with back-to-back victories, Real Madrid would end up with 15 points, but they would need to wait for the results of other teams to determine their final position.

arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without a right back when they take on RB Salzburg in the Champions League.
